title: Spanish Perilla Leaf Paella
description: A dense and flavorful Catalan dish featuring perilla leaves and score fat, suitable for low fat diets with modifications
instructions: Heat the score fat in a large paella pan or skillet over medium high heat
Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes
Add the perilla leaves and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes
Add the paprika, salt, and black pepper and stir to combine
Add the uncooked rice and stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes
Add the tomato and stir to combine
Continue to simmer, covered, for an additional 10 minutes or until the rice is tender
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
